title: Village Farms International Reports Third Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: Village Farms Q3 2022 consolidated sales were $71.1 million, a decrease of 2% from $72.4 million in the prior year. Consolidated net loss was $8.7 million, or $0.10 per share, compared to net income of $0.8 million in Q3 2021. Consolidated adjusted EBITDA was negative $2.2 million compared with positive adjusted EBITDA of $6.9 million. Total Cannabis segment net sales increased 14% year-over-year to $35.5 million, representing 50% of total Village Farms sales. Canadian Cannabis net sales increased 15% to a record $30.4 million with a gross margin of 32% and adjusted EBITDA of $5.4 million. Retail branded sales surged 46% year-over-year and 26% sequentially. Management stated the company achieved another sales record, outstanding growth in retail sales and became Canada's number 1 in October. Rose LifeScience ranked as Quebec's number 2 LP in October. U.S. Cannabis sales were $5.1 million with 69% gross margin. Fresh Produce sales declined to $35.5 million from $41.0 million with adjusted EBITDA of negative $4.9 million versus positive $1.3 million previously.
